description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Context: when one changed file (e.g. lib/atlas/application.ex) sits in the surface of many subjects with no realized_by bindings, the queue floods with near-identical code-only rows (atlas PR 62: 17 rows for one small diff). The fan-out is honest signal; the presentation is the problem.

Deliverable:
1. Queue collapse (view-model, review.ex): when a single changed file is the ONLY changed file for >=3 code-only subjects, replace those rows with one group row in the Code-only queue section: file path + collapsed-subject count + aggregated finding badges. Subjects with any other changed file keep their own row. Spec-edited subjects never collapse. Each qualifying file produces its own group row. Collapsed subjects' unit sections remain rendered and deep-linkable; the queue filter matches a group row when the filter text matches a collapsed subject's id.
2. Group detail pane (html.ex): renders the shared diff exactly ONCE, plus one card per collapsed subject (subject id, clamped prose summary from meta, finding badges). Cards link to the subject's full unit anchor.
3. Spec modal: activating a card opens a self-contained <dialog> with the subject's full spec (statement, requirements, scenarios) embedded in the artifact — no network fetch — while the diff stays visible behind. Esc/backdrop closes. Modal links to the subject's full unit section.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: mix test test/specled_ex/review_test.exs (view-model grouping), mix test test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs (group row, pane, modal rendering)
- Behaviors to demonstrate: specled.spec_review.shared_file_queue_collapses_fanout, specled.spec_review.shared_file_group_pane_renders_once, specled.spec_review.shared_file_modal_orients_reviewer

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/coverage.ex (subject_file_map semantics unchanged)
- lib/specled_ex/change_analysis.ex
- lib/mix/tasks/**
- .spec/specs/* other than spec_review.spec.md
Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- lib/specled_ex/review.ex
- lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex
- priv/spec_review_assets/**
- test/specled_ex/review_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs
- .spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md
- .spec/state.json (regenerated)

Out of Scope (intent):
- No change to how files map to subjects (surface expansion, verification targets) — this is presentation only
- No comment-only-hunk detection or diff significance heuristics
- No change to findings computation; no_realized_by findings still fire per subject
- Collapse threshold (3) is a presentation constant, not configurable in v1

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes (mix spec.check)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

IMPLEMENTED
Session: b2c766a1-a4a1-40e7-93b9-8466e98f85d7
Log: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/b2c766a1-a4a1-40e7-93b9-8466e98f85d7.jsonl

Commit: 7cb9962
Files touched: lib/specled_ex/review.ex, lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex, test/specled_ex/review_test.exs, test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs, .spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md, .spec/state.json (regenerated)
Tests added: ReviewTest "shared-file fan-in collapse" describe (4 tests: >=3 collapse, below-threshold no-op, spec-edited exemption via threshold, multiple groups); HtmlLayoutTest "shared-file fan-in collapse" describe (3 tests: queue group row + hidden individual rows + deep-linkable panes, group pane diff-once + cards, embedded dialog with full spec + close/link wiring)
Verification stubs flipped: mix test test/specled_ex/review_test.exs (shared_file_fanin_collapse), mix test test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs (shared_file_fanin_collapse, shared_file_group_pane, shared_file_spec_modal) — both execute: true

Summary: build_view now computes shared_file_groups (files that are the only changed file for >=3 code-only subjects) and drops collapsed subjects from queue_subjects while keeping their full detail panes. The renderer adds a group queue row (path + N subjects + worst-severity dot, filterable via data-subject-ids), a unit-shared-<slug> pane rendering the shared diff exactly once beside per-subject cards, and a per-subject <dialog> embedding the full spec (statement/requirements/scenarios) with Esc/backdrop/button close and a link to the full unit pane. Verified end-to-end in a browser against an atlas-PR-62-shaped fixture (5 subjects collapsed, modal over visible diff, filter surfacing group row). Gates: compile -Werror clean, 937 tests 0 failures, format clean, deps.unlock clean, mix spec.check pass (0 warnings, 0 findings, single_subject=specled.spec_review).

VERIFY: PASS Session: b2c766a1-a4a1-40e7-93b9-8466e98f85d7 Log: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/b2c766a1-a4a1-40e7-93b9-8466e98f85d7.jsonl Mechanical checks: - Files touched: 6 (.spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md, .spec/state.json, lib/specled_ex/review.ex, lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex, test/specled_ex/review_test.exs, test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs) - Files outside Allowed globs: 0 - Files matching Out-of-Scope globs: 0 (coverage.ex, change_analysis.ex, lib/mix/tasks/** all untouched) Semantic checks: - Spec stubs run: 2, passed: 2 (mix test test/specled_ex/review_test.exs — 27 tests 0 failures; mix test test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs — 29 tests 0 failures; both flipped to execute: true in spec_review.spec.md) - Requirements coverage: - shared_file_fanin_collapse: covered by test/specled_ex/review_test.exs:407,454,476,509 and test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs:800. Would fail if collapse formed below 3 (454 asserts shared_file_groups == []), if collapsed subjects kept individual rows (800 refutes data-subject-id per collapsed id), if a multi-file subject collapsed (407 asserts delta.subject stays in queue_subjects), if spec-edited subjects were groupable (476 asserts shared_file_groups == [] when gamma flips to spec_edited), if unit panes were dropped (800 asserts id="unit-subject-" per collapsed subject), or if per-file grouping merged (509 asserts two distinct groups with 4 and 3 subjects). - shared_file_group_pane: covered by test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs:839. Would fail if the diff rendered per collapsed subject instead of once (asserts exactly 1
in the pane), if a card were missing (asserts 3 shared-subject-card + per-subject id, meta summary text, and href="#unit-subject-" link). - shared_file_spec_modal: covered by test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs:862. Would fail if the dialog were not embedded per subject (asserts ), if spec content were not embedded (asserts requirement statement "Alpha must stay supervised." and scenario id alpha.subject.scenario1 in the pane), or if close/link wiring were dropped (asserts data-modal-close, spec-modal-unit-link href, showModal + backdrop-click JS). - Intent-level scope concerns: none — file→subject mapping untouched (coverage.ex/change_analysis.ex not in diff); findings pipeline in review.ex unchanged (diff only adds shared_file_groups + collapsed-id rejection in build_queue_subjects); no comment-hunk/diff-significance heuristics; threshold is a module attribute (@shared_file_collapse_threshold 3), not configurable. - Project verification: pass (mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean; mix test 937 tests 0 failures; mix format --check-formatted clean; mix deps.unlock --check-unused clean; mix spec.check pass — 0 errors 0 warnings 0 branch findings, change_type=single_subject impacted=specled.spec_review) - Audit-expanded scope: none (no prior AUDIT BOUNCE comments on this ticket) Verdict: PASS Notes (advisory, do not change verdict): - Two sub-clauses named in the requirement statements are not pinned by a shipped assertion, though I independently verified both render correctly against the exact fixture shape: (1) shared_file_fanin_collapse's 'aggregated finding indicator' — no test asserts the group row's queue-dot severity class; an independent probe confirmed queue-dot-info renders (worst_severity_across works, string severities end-to-end). (2) shared_file_group_pane's 'inline finding badges' on cards — no test asserts badge markup; probe confirmed 1 info renders in shared-card-meta. Recommend adding one assertion each to html_layout_test.exs:800 and :839 in a follow-up; a regression in worst_severity_across or a dropped render_subject_finding_badges call would currently pass the suite. - group.diffstat (review.ex build_shared_file_groups) is computed but never consumed by the renderer — dead field, harmless. - Runtime-only clauses (filter matching, Esc/backdrop close, diff visible behind modal) are pinned at mechanism level (data-subject-ids attr, showModal/backdrop JS, native ), consistent with the file's stated convention for inherently-runtime behavior; implementer additionally reported a manual browser pass.

IMPLEMENTED (iteration 2)

Files touched since iteration 1: test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs, .spec/state.json (regenerated)
Tests added: assertions pinning the group row's aggregated worst-severity queue-dot, a card's inline finding badge, and the group row's position inside the Code-only section; removed one redundant weak assertion (test-critic notes 1-3)
Verification stubs flipped: unchanged from iteration 1 (both execute: true)

TEST_CRITIC: FIXED (iteration 2)

Blocking findings: 0 (resolved: 0, waived: 0); 6 advisory notes — notes 1-3 applied (finding-indicator pinning, positional Code-only assertion, redundant assertion dropped), notes 4-6 declined: modal spot-check on one subject is proportionate, group ordering IS a deliberate deterministic contract (count desc, then file), and Regex.run|>hd() matches the file's existing idiom at html_layout_test.exs:149
Files reviewed: test/specled_ex/review_test.exs, test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs

VERIFY: PASS (re-run after rebase + iteration 2)
Session: b2c766a1-a4a1-40e7-93b9-8466e98f85d7
Log: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/b2c766a1-a4a1-40e7-93b9-8466e98f85d7.jsonl

Re-verified at HEAD 90e05b0 (a9fbbbb spec distill -> 4f893e4 implementation -> 90e05b0 test iteration), base origin/main = cafe2fe.

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 6 (.spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md, .spec/state.json, lib/specled_ex/review.ex, lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex, test/specled_ex/review_test.exs, test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs)
- Files outside Allowed globs: 0
- Files matching Out-of-Scope globs: 0 (coverage.ex, change_analysis.ex, lib/mix/tasks/** untouched)

Rebase delta check:
- The implementation diff vs the new origin/main is hunk-for-hunk identical to what I verified pre-rebase for lib/specled_ex/review.ex and lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex — no logic drift introduced by conflict resolution.
- The html.ex JS conflict zone resolved correctly: upstream .9's resolveWikilinks() call is retained AND the ticket's filter extension (data-subject-ids read) is present; both blocks coexist.
- Spec diff vs new main still adds exactly 3 requirements, 3 scenarios, and the 2 execute:true stubs; nothing else in spec_review.spec.md changed.
- .spec/state.json regenerated post-rebase; mix spec.check leaves the tree clean (regeneration matches the commit).

Iteration-2 delta (90e05b0, addresses my prior Note + test-critic):
- html_layout_test.exs:980 now asserts the group row's aggregated worst-severity indicator concretely: extracts the queue-shared-file <li> and asserts queue-dot-warning (post-rebase fixture subjects carry an untested-must warning that must outrank the info no_realized_by — this pins worst_severity_across's ordering, not just presence). Also asserts the group row appears after the 'Code only' section label (positional at/2 check).
- html_layout_test.exs:1027 now asserts a card renders <span class="badge badge-info"> — pins the inline finding badges clause.
- Dropped assertion was the redundant html =~ "data-subject-ids" (the same attribute is still pinned, stronger, via the ids_attr Regex extraction on the group row + per-id membership asserts). No coverage lost.
- Both prior advisory gaps from my first VERIFY are now closed by shipped assertions.

Semantic checks:
- Spec stubs run: 2, passed: 2 (mix test test/specled_ex/review_test.exs — 29 tests 0 failures; mix test test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs — 40 tests 0 failures)
- Requirements coverage:
  - shared_file_fanin_collapse: covered by test/specled_ex/review_test.exs:478,525,547,580 and test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs:980. Would fail if collapse formed below 3 (525), if collapsed subjects kept individual rows (980 refutes per-id data-subject-id), if a multi-file subject collapsed (478 delta.subject stays), if spec-edited subjects were groupable (547), if unit panes were dropped (980 unit-subject anchors), if per-file grouping merged (580), if the group row left the Code-only section (980 positional assert), or if severity aggregation broke (980 queue-dot-warning would regress to -info/-none).
  - shared_file_group_pane: covered by test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs:1027. Would fail if the diff rendered more than once in the pane (count == 1), if a card/id/summary/unit-link were missing, or if inline finding badges were dropped (badge badge-info assert).
  - shared_file_spec_modal: covered by test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs:1057. Would fail if the per-subject <dialog> were missing, if spec content (requirement statement, scenario id) were not embedded, or if close/link wiring (data-modal-close, spec-modal-unit-link, showModal, backdrop JS) were dropped.
- Intent-level scope concerns: none — findings pipeline in review.ex unchanged; no diff heuristics; threshold remains @shared_file_collapse_threshold 3 module attribute.
- Project verification: pass (mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean; mix test 959 tests + 3 properties, 0 failures; mix format --check-formatted clean; mix deps.unlock --check-unused clean; mix spec.check pass — 0 errors 0 warnings 0 branch findings, change_type=single_subject impacted=specled.spec_review, 330 requirements)
- Audit-expanded scope: none (no AUDIT BOUNCE comments on this ticket)

Verdict: PASS

Notes (advisory only):
- group.diffstat in build_shared_file_groups is still computed but never consumed by the renderer — dead field, harmless; fine to prune opportunistically later.
- Runtime-only clauses (filter behavior, Esc/backdrop close, diff-behind-modal) remain pinned at mechanism level, consistent with the file's stated convention; implementer previously reported a manual browser pass.
- The at/2 positional helper used at :980 is upstream (landed with .5-.10), not a ticket addition — no scope concern.

title: Shared-file fan-in collapse: group code-only subjects behind their common changed file
